sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Eightco (NASDAQ:ORBS) Shares Gap Down - Should You Sell?
feed.summary: Eightco (NASDAQ:ORBS) shares gapped down by $0.13, opening at $2.77 after closing at $2.90, with a volume of 723,260 shares. Analysts have a bearish outlook, with Weiss Ratings reiterating a "sell (d-)" and Wall Street Zen downgrading to "sell," resulting in a MarketBeat consensus rating of "Sell." The company's fundamentals are weak, reporting a ($0.58) EPS, negative net margin of ~74%, negative ROE of -14.76%, and a negative P/E of -2.02.

feed.title: Skyworks Solutions (NASDAQ:SWKS) sheds US$349m, company earnings and investor returns have been trending downwards for past five years

feed.title: Procter & Gamble (PG): Has the 14% Share Price Slide Opened a Valuation Opportunity?
feed.summary: Procter & Gamble's shares have fallen 14% over the past year, sparking debate among investors about its current valuation. While one narrative suggests the stock is 19.2% overvalued with a fair value of $119.81 due to modest growth expectations, Simply Wall St's Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) model indicates it may be undervalued by about 26% from an estimated fair value of $194.19. This presents a divergence in valuation perspectives, prompting investors to consider whether PG is a defensive blue chip on sale or if its future growth is already priced in.

feed.title: US FDA issues Form 483 to Dr Reddy’s Andhra Pradesh formulations unit
feed.summary: Dr Reddy's Laboratories received a Form 483 with five observations from the US FDA following a GMP and PAI inspection at its Srikakulam, Andhra Pradesh formulations unit. The inspection took place from December 4 to December 12, 2025. The company plans to address these observations within the specified timeline.

feed.title: Moolec Science adjourns shareholder meeting due to lack of quorum
feed.summary: Moolec Science SA (NASDAQ:MLEC) announced the adjournment of its virtual extraordinary general meeting of shareholders to December 16, 2025, due to a lack of the required quorum. Only 39.85% of eligible shares were voted, falling short of the necessary threshold. The company stated that if a quorum isn't met at the rescheduled meeting, any present shareholders or proxies will constitute a quorum to proceed with the agenda.

feed.title: Nordson Corporation (NASDAQ:NDSN) Q4 2025 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Nordson Corporation (NASDAQ: NDSN) reported strong Q4 and fiscal year 2025 results, with adjusted EPS up 9% and record EBITDA of $256 million for the quarter, and record sales of $2.8 billion for the full year. The company emphasized the success of its Ascend Strategy, achieving a 2025 EBITDA goal of $900 million, and provided optimistic guidance for fiscal 2026, anticipating sales growth between 1% and 6% and adjusted EPS growth of 6% to 12%. Management noted stabilization in industrial and polymer processing markets, strong medical segment growth, and continued momentum in semiconductor applications within their Advanced Technology Solutions segment.

feed.title: Pomerantz LLP Issues Reminder to CarMax, Inc. Shareholders – KMX
feed.summary: Pomerantz LLP has issued a reminder to CarMax, Inc. (NYSE: KMX) shareholders about a class action lawsuit filed against the company. The lawsuit alleges securities fraud and other unlawful business practices after CarMax reported second-quarter fiscal year 2026 earnings per share and sales that fell significantly short of consensus estimates, causing its stock price to drop. Shareholders who purchased CarMax securities during the Class Period have until January 2, 2026, to seek appointment as Lead Plaintiff.
